title: Predictive and robust gene selection for spatial transcriptomics.
author: Covert I Gala R Wang T Svoboda K Sumbul U Lee SI
content: S-EPMC10097645 PMC10097645 Predictive and robust gene selection for spatial transcriptomics. A prominent trend in single-cell transcriptomics is providing spatial context alongside a characterization of each cell's molecular state. This typically requires targeting an a priori selection of genes
